from sqlmodel import Session, SQLModel, Field, create_engine, select
from typing import Optional


class Product(SQLModel, table=True):
    id: Optional[int] = Field(default=None, primary_key=True)
    name: str
    category: str


class Order(SQLModel, table=True):
    id: Optional[int] = Field(default=None, primary_key=True)
    product_id: int
    quantity: int


engine = create_engine("postgresql://user:pass@localhost/mydb")


def enrich_orders(order_ids: list[int]) -> list[dict]:
    with Session(engine) as session:
        orders = session.exec(select(Order).where(Order.id.in_(order_ids))).all()
        product_ids = [o.product_id for o in orders]
        products = session.exec(select(Product).where(Product.id.in_(product_ids))).all()
        product_map = {p.id: p for p in products}
        return [
            {
                "order_id": o.id,
                "product_name": product_map[o.product_id].name,
                "quantity": o.quantity,
            }
            for o in orders
        ]


def find_related_products(product_ids: list[int]) -> dict[int, list[str]]:
    with Session(engine) as session:
        products = session.exec(select(Product).where(Product.id.in_(product_ids))).all()
        categories = {p.category for p in products}
        related_products = session.exec(
            select(Product).where(Product.category.in_(categories))
        ).all()
        related_map: dict[str, list[str]] = {}
        for p in related_products:
            related_map.setdefault(p.category, []).append(p.name)
        return {p.id: related_map.get(p.category, []) for p in products}
